hero.sub: Slow down, unwind, and come back to yourself with holistic treatments shaped around your body, mind, and mood.

services.title: Treatments for Every Sense
services.sub: A curated menu of therapies to release tension, refresh your skin, and reset your energy.

items.name: Massage Therapy
items.desc: Melt away built-up tension and rebalance the body with our signature hands-on rituals.

items.name: Facial Care
items.desc: Uncover a fresh, luminous complexion through skincare tailored to you.

items.name: Body Rituals
items.desc: Purify, nourish, and soften with soothing full-body wraps and scrubs.

items.name: Aromatherapy
items.desc: Breathe deeply as botanical oils quiet the mind and lift the spirit.

items.name: Guided Meditation
items.desc: Learn to settle a busy mind with sessions led by our wellness coaches.

items.name: Hydro Therapy
items.desc: Ease sore muscles in warm mineral pools and restorative water treatments.

packages.title: Journeys Made Just for You
packages.sub: Half-day and full-day escapes that pair several treatments into one seamless experience.

items.name: Serenity Escape
items.desc: A gentle afternoon of massage, facial, and quiet tea to soften a hard week.

items.name: Renewal Retreat
items.desc: A full-day reset built around detox rituals, aromatherapy, and mindful rest.

items.name: Together Time
items.desc: Share a calming side-by-side ritual with someone you love.

rejuvenate.title: Awaken Every Sense
rejuvenate.sub: Step into a quiet sanctuary where each treatment is shaped to soothe the mind, restore the body, and gently reawaken your senses. Our therapists guide you toward deep, lasting calm.

feats.title: Natural Care
feats.text: Botanical, cruelty-free products chosen for skin and planet alike.

feats.title: Calm Spaces
feats.text: Warm light, soft sound, and private rooms built for true rest.

feats.title: Expert Hands
feats.text: Certified therapists with years of dedicated practice.

feats.title: Thoughtful Gifting
feats.text: Beautifully wrapped vouchers for the people you cherish.

benefits.title: Care You Can Feel
benefits.sub: Small touches, considered spaces, and genuine attention — the details that make a visit linger.

items.title: Holistic Approach
items.text: We treat the whole person, not a single symptom.

items.title: Clean Ingredients
items.text: Gentle, plant-led formulas kind to sensitive skin.

items.title: Easy Booking
items.text: Reserve in moments and reschedule with a tap.

items.title: Personal Touch
items.text: Every session is shaped around how you feel today.

therapists.title: Meet Our Therapists
therapists.sub: A warm, experienced team devoted to helping you feel entirely at ease.

pricing.title: Treatments & Pricing
pricing.sub: Transparent pricing with no surprises — choose a category to see the full list.

book2.title: Book Your Appointment
book2.sub: Tell us what you need and when — we'll take care of the rest.

testimonials.title: Loved by Our Guests
testimonials.sub: The moments that stay with people long after they leave.

items.quote: The care in every detail and the hush of the rooms made my visit something I still think about.

items.quote: I arrived tense and left feeling like a different person. The therapists truly listen.
